questions.q: In early May 2026, the World Health Organization investigated a rare suspected human-to-human transmission of what rodent-borne virus on a stranded cruise ship?
Which state filed a lawsuit in May 2026 against artificial intelligence company Character.AI, alleging its chatbots illegally acted as licensed medical doctors?
In May 2026, the U.S. Supreme Court temporarily blocked a lower court ruling, fully restoring access to which abortion pill through telehealth and mail?
As part of his 'MAHA' push, Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. initiated a campaign in May 2026 to wean Americans off of which class of medications?
According to CDC data highlighted in May 2026, which U.S. state saw its tuberculosis cases hit a 12-year high, significantly outpacing the national average?
